budgets.name: No secondary browser runtime
budgets.requirement: Trusted shell package contains no Electron, Tauri, system webview, Chromium/WebKit/Gecko shell dependency, or remote-rendered chrome.

budgets.name: No shell JavaScript runtime
budgets.requirement: Normal release shell contains no React runtime, JavaScript VM, Node runtime, DOM, CSSOM, or runtime HTML/CSS parser.

budgets.name: Single production backend
budgets.requirement: Compile one selected backend and renderer; additional fallback requires measured platform evidence.

budgets.name: Interactive startup
budgets.metric: process start to interactive address field
budgets.gate: Set after equivalent toolkit prototype on reference platform.

budgets.name: Input latency
budgets.gate: Must fit product interaction budget without hidden work.

budgets.name: Update allocation
budgets.metric: allocations and bytes for tab activation, close, reorder, address typing, and resource updates
budgets.gate: No full-tree rebuild for bounded local updates.

budgets.name: Hidden-window efficiency
budgets.requirement: No unbounded animation or periodic wakeup when hidden, minimized, occluded, or suspended.

budgets.name: Lazy feature loading
budgets.requirement: Settings, history, DevTools, agents, and first-party Plug-in panels are not instantiated before use.

budgets.name: Package contribution
budgets.metric: stripped binary, compressed package, dynamic libraries, assets, and symbols by UI feature set
budgets.gate: Candidate comparison must disclose backend and renderer features.

budgets.name: Page composition
budgets.metric: surface publish-to-present latency, damage cost, resize, scale, and device-loss recovery

budgets.name: Accessibility latency
budgets.metric: state change to platform accessibility event/tree availability
budgets.gate: Must pass real assistive-technology workflow thresholds.
